history.text: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
The image displays a chat conversation. The conversation is between two individuals, indicated by the speech bubbles. One user sends messages like "Tidak, memasukkannya secara manual.", "Benar sekali. Bisakah Anda memasukkan data suara dengan benar, Tuan Sorano?", "Ya", and "Saya menerima pesan audio.". The other user sends messages such as "Jadi, kamu bilang itu benar-benar lucu?", "Bagaimana melakukannya?", "Anda", and "Bisakah saya menghapusnnya? Sebenarnya, saya akan menghapusnnya.". There are also timestamps indicating when messages were read and audio messages with durations. The content of the chat is about manual data entry, voice data, and deleting messages. There is no explicit or suggestive content present in the image.
